books.title: Introduction to Python on the Pico
books.description: Learn to program the Raspberry Pi Pico with MicroPython — from wiring your first LED to controlling NeoPixel strips, DC motors, and servo motors.

books.title: Connected Little Boxes
books.description: Use the Connected Little Box framework to build devices that respond to the world — buttons, NeoPixels, rotary encoders, stepper motors, and ultrasonic sensors, all orchestrated by the CLB manager system.
